```json
{
  "checks": {
    "check_balance_sheet": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Balance sheet balances all periods: Y0-Y3 all show Assets = Liabilities + Equity"},
    "check_cash_flow_reconciles": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Ending cash on CFS matches cash on BS each period (2,800, 2,400, 2,000)"},
    "check_pnl_flows_to_bs": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Net income is (126) but equity decreased by 480, indicating unexplained 354K discrepancy"},
    "check_opening_balances": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Each period's opening cash equals prior period's closing"},
    "check_no_hardcoded": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "All expenses are fixed percentages (COGS 20%, S&M 40%, etc.) with no derivation from operational assumptions"},
    "check_growth_from_assumptions": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Revenue growth follows stated 40% YoY assumption: 1.8M × 1.40 = 2,520K"},
    "check_unit_economics_consistent": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "ACV of 40K and 45 customers should yield 1.8M ARR, but customer growth not modeled"},
    "check_no_circular_refs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "No circular references identified in the model structure"},
    "check_three_statements": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "P&L, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow Statement all present"},
    "check_assumptions_page": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Basic assumptions listed but no dedicated assumptions section with operational drivers"},
    "check_time_granularity": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Annual periods consistent across all statements"},
    "check_full_horizon": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "3-year horizon covered (Y1-Y3)"},
    "check_no_negative_revenue": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Revenue is positive across all periods"},
    "check_cash_not_negative": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash remains positive: 2,800, 2,400, 2,000 but declining trend concerning"},
    "check_margins_plausible": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Total expenses = 105% of revenue (20%+40%+30%+15%), guaranteeing permanent losses"},
    "check_headcount_math": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Team grows from 12 to 50 people but no headcount-based salary calculations shown"},
    "check_tax_rate": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "No taxes applied due to losses, which is appropriate"},
    "check_periods_labeled": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Periods clearly labeled as Y0, Y1, Y2, Y3"},
    "check_units_specified": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Units specified as ($000s) throughout"},
    "check_inputs_vs_outputs": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "No clear distinction between assumption inputs and calculated outputs"}
  },
  "rubric": {
    "rubric_assumption_quality": {"score": 2, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Basic assumptions stated but not sourced, percentage-based expenses lack operational justification"},
    "rubric_scenario_robustness": {"score": 1, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Single base case only, no sensitivity analysis despite note saying 'not included'"},
    "rubric_operational_realism": {"score": 1, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Purely percentage-based model with no operational drivers, headcount growth disconnected from expenses"},
    "rubric_cash_flow_awareness": {"score": 2, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Cash flow statement exists but working capital changes appear arbitrary, no funding plan for declining cash"},
    "rubric_decision_utility": {"score": 1, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Model provides no decision guidance, expense structure guarantees losses regardless of growth"}
  }
}
```
